final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster / PPT cover slide for the launch of 长安起源Q06, an automotive brand reveal, debuting in September.

Style/medium: photorealistic CGI automotive key visual, sleek and bold, in the spirit of high-end Chinese automotive brand launch campaigns
Composition: wide cinematic horizontal layout, car as central hero element, title and subtitle text anchored in lower-center or lower-left, generous negative space above for visual breathing room
Subject: 长安起源Q06 SUV rendered in dramatic three-quarter front view, sharp body lines, premium finish, commanding presence
Scene/backdrop: deep cosmic or atmospheric abstract background — translucent layers of light, volumetric mist, and subtle geometric depth suggesting technological sophistication; dark base with luminous breakout zones creating a sense of depth and grandeur
Lighting/mood: dramatic rim lighting on the vehicle silhouette, cool blue-white primary light source, warm amber accent glow, high contrast between subject and background to convey power and revelation
Color palette: deep midnight navy and black as base, electric ice-blue as brand accent, subtle gold or amber highlight on vehicle edges, white for title text
Text (verbatim): "长安起源Q06" as primary headline; "9月上市" as subtitle
Constraints: text must be legible against the background; layout must work as a 16:9 widescreen PPT cover; brand name and launch date must be visually prominent
Avoid: generic stock-photo car backgrounds, lens flare overload, cluttered layout, watermark, cartoon or illustrated style
